name: Employee onboarding with existing employee row
description: Onboarded company with one minimally-decorated employee so the employee list renders a row plus the Add CTA. The two consuming specs (employee-list-with-existing-employee and employee-update-reentry-lifecycle) only assert that a grid row appears and that the edit form pre-fills first_name — no compensation/job/onboarding_status setup needed. Keeping home_address + work_address means the row is still 'real' enough to enter the edit flow without the SDK crashing on missing data.
